name: Boss Credit
description_short: Boss Credit is a credit repair provider based in Las Vegas, Nevada. Rated 5.0/5 with 288 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Boss Credit is a Las Vegas-based credit repair firm that specializes in helping consumers identify and dispute inaccuracies on their credit reports. The company is licensed and bonded in Nevada and has earned repeated recognition from Expertise.com as one of the top credit repair services in Las Vegas (awarded 2021, 2023, and 2024). With a 5.0-star rating drawn from nearly 300 Google reviews, Boss Credit has built a strong local reputation, with clients frequently crediting individual staff member Erick Fornos by name for personalized, attentive service.

The firm's core work centers on pulling and analyzing credit reports from all three major bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion — to flag inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items. From there, the team manages the dispute process directly with creditors and bureaus, aiming to remove negative entries such as late payments, collections, and other derogatory marks. Beyond dispute-based repair, Boss Credit offers credit building strategies designed to help clients establish or strengthen positive credit history over time. The company also provides one-on-one credit counseling sessions focused on financial literacy and long-term decision-making. A free initial consultation is available, and clients reportedly receive real-time updates on their progress throughout the process. Google's business classification also lists Boss Credit under business management consulting, suggesting the firm may serve small business owners seeking to build or repair business credit alongside personal credit.

Before signing on, consumers should note a few practical considerations. Pricing is not published on the homepage — clients are directed to a separate pricing page or consultation to get specifics. The website references results achievable "in a short period of time," which is a common marketing phrase in this industry and should be interpreted cautiously; credit repair timelines vary significantly depending on the complexity and age of the items being disputed. Additionally, while the company states it adheres to strict ethical standards and operates within the law, a formal Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) compliance statement is not prominently displayed on the main page — consumers should confirm this disclosure is provided in their service agreement, as CROA requires it.

On balance, Boss Credit presents as a credible, community-rooted option for Nevada residents navigating credit challenges. The volume and consistency of its five-star reviews are genuinely unusual in a category where mixed feedback is common, and the recurring, named mentions of specific staff suggest a client experience that feels personal rather than transactional. The key areas worth verifying before committing are fee structure transparency and whether written CROA disclosures are included in the contract. For consumers willing to do that due diligence upfront, Boss Credit appears to be among the stronger local options in the Las Vegas market.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally strong reputation — 5.0/5 from 288 Google reviews, rare in the credit repair space
Licensed and bonded in Nevada, providing a baseline of regulatory accountability
Recognized by Expertise.com as a top Las Vegas credit repair service in 2021, 2023, and 2024
Free initial consultation with no stated upfront commitment
Clients receive real-time progress updates throughout the dispute process
Personalized service model — reviews consistently name individual staff, suggesting genuine client attention
cons: Pricing is not disclosed on the homepage; consumers must request a consultation or visit a separate page to compare costs
No explicit CROA compliance disclosure visible on the main website — confirm it appears in the written contract before signing
Claims of results 'in a short period of time' are vague and typical of industry marketing; realistic timelines vary and are not specified
Limited publicly available information about the full team, company history, or years in operation
Service appears primarily focused on Nevada residents; unclear whether remote or out-of-state clients are served
best_for: Consumers in Las Vegas, Nevada looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: Boss Credit is best suited for Las Vegas-area consumers who want a hands-on, locally accountable credit repair partner with a proven track record of client satisfaction. The main caveat is that pricing and CROA disclosures are not transparent on the public website, so prospective clients should request a written service agreement and review all fees and cancellation terms before enrolling.
services: Credit report analysis across all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Dispute resolution with credit bureaus and original creditors
Removal of inaccurate or unverifiable negative items (late payments, collections, charge-offs)
Credit building strategy and score improvement planning
One-on-one credit counseling and financial literacy coaching
Real-time progress tracking and client updates
Business credit consulting (based on business management services designation)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1500 E Tropicana Ave STE 162, Las Vegas, NV 89119
quarantine_reason: Website hacked — serving cialis/spam content. Delisted 2026-04-01.
